title: Selling Online Without Gumroad: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you’re a creator in Nigeria, Pakistan, or Ghana, Gumroad’s ‘global’ promise falls flat. PayPal and Stripe block your country. Local payment processors fail for digital goods. Gumroad itself flags accounts in restricted regions, even if you bypass payments. This post compares Gumroad to crypto-native alternatives like Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99). We’ll break down which option actually works for selling ebooks, courses, or templates when traditional platforms lock you out.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad bundles payment processing, file hosting, and basic analytics into one platform. It’s simple but relies on PayPal/Stripe for payouts. Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) decouples payments from delivery. You get a backend engine that automates file delivery, verifies crypto payments, and generates receipts without needing a payment processor account. The Web3 Wallet Connect adds frontend crypto payment options. Both systems let you self-host files, but Unchained’s model removes all geographic dependencies by design.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad technically allows creators from blocked countries if they use Stripe Atlas or complex workarounds. But these require US bank accounts or foreign LLCs—impossible for most. Unchained Commerce’s system bypasses this entirely. Since payments route through NOWPayments (300+ coins, no KYC), your location doesn’t matter. Buyers pay in crypto, you get paid in crypto, and files deliver instantly. No intermediary platform can shut you down for your address.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

The crypto payment alternative is not a workaround — it is a structurally different approach to commerce. NOWPayments operates as a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT on multiple chains, Solana, and Tron. Transactions settle directly to a wallet you control. There is no platform holding period, no payout schedule, and no compliance department deciding whether your country is permitted to receive funds. The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments via webhook, which means every confirmed transaction automatically triggers delivery — no manual steps, no delays, no dependency on a platform that can suspend your access.
Gumroad blocks creators in restricted countries even if they bypass PayPal/Stripe workarounds.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad automates delivery for paid products but lacks customization. Unchained’s Core Shop Engine verifies payments, sends PDF receipts, and delivers files via email or download link automatically. The Admin Dashboard lets you manage orders and track analytics. For crypto-native buyers, the Wallet Connect module generates multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. Both systems work, but Unchained gives you more control without platform lock-in.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you’re in a supported country with a US bank account, Gumroad’s simplicity might work. But if PayPal/Stripe blocks your region, or you want to avoid 10% platform fees, Unchained’s Full Stack Bundle is the only option. It’s more technical to set up but gives you permanent infrastructure. Choose Gumroad for convenience if eligible. Choose Unchained if you’re blocked, want higher margins, or prefer crypto payments.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The best PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries is a crypto payment processor like NOWPayments. It supports 300+ coins, requires no KYC, and works globally. Pair it with a system like Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine to automate file delivery and receipts. This setup removes geographic restrictions entirely, letting you sell digital products to anyone with a crypto wallet.
Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle removes all geographic restrictions by design.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you’re searching for PayPal alternatives in Nigeria or ways to sell without Stripe in Pakistan, the core issue is geographic restrictions. Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) addresses this with crypto-native infrastructure. Get it at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. For solo developers building their own stores, the Web3 Wallet Connect module integrates crypto payments into any frontend.
Your Action Checklist

First, buy the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Deploy the Core Shop Engine to your server using the included guide. Upload your digital products and set prices in USD or crypto. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect module for frontend payments. Test the checkout flow with a small transaction. Launch your store and share the link with your audience. Track sales and manage orders through the Admin Dashboard.
Crypto payments give you 98–99.5% revenue share vs. Gumroad’s 90%—no subscriptions required.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
